- Orchestrated site reliability engineering initiatives by deploying multi-layered monitoring solutions using Datadog, Newrelic, and Grafana across Azure distributed systems, creating custom dashboards tracking service health metrics, and automating incident escalation workflows through Python scripts integrated with ITSM platforms for faster resolution.

bullets: Deployed Radware SaaS cWAAP across 40+ healthcare web applications to enforce WAF and API protection while maintaining HIPAA compliance, configuring SSL/TLS offloading, certificate management, and traffic routing to ensure continuous availability for patient portals and EHR integrations with minimal operational disruption.

Reviewed Radware cWAAP logs daily using Azure Log Analytics and Microsoft Sentinel, identifying false positives and tuning security rules aligned with OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, customizing rulesets to block SQL injection, XSS, and remote code execution attempts targeting healthcare APIs and PHI-handling systems.

Integrated Radware cWAAP logs with Splunk, QRadar, and Microsoft Sentinel to design normalized log parsers and correlation rules detecting healthcare-specific attack patterns, including unauthorized PHI access, API abuse, and data exfiltration attempts across distributed clinical environments and telehealth platforms.

Automated log ingestion pipelines using Azure Logic Apps and Radware APIs to centralize threat intelligence into SIEM dashboards, enabling real-time incident response workflows, audit readiness for HIPAA compliance reporting, and streamlined integration with Snowflake Data Platform for advanced analytics.

Collaborated with Network Services and Border Protection teams to onboard 30+ applications into Radware SaaS cWAAP, conducting pre-deployment security assessments, traffic profiling, and load testing using Azure Load Balancer to validate seamless integration and establish ongoing support workflows.

Analyzed and remediated code-based security vulnerabilities by conducting SAST and DAST assessments, identifying insecure API endpoints, hardcoded credentials, and improper input validation aligned with OWASP Top 10, partnering with development teams to embed fixes into the SDLC before production deployment.

Embedded security controls throughout the Application Lifecycle Management process by integrating secure software development practices into CI/CD pipelines, enforcing pre-commit security scans using SAST tools, and validating API protection policies with DevOps engineers before promoting builds to production environments.

Performed comprehensive third-party application risk analysis for vendor-hosted healthcare SaaS solutions, evaluating API security posture, data encryption standards, and compliance with HIPAA Business Associate Agreement requirements using OWASP risk assessment frameworks and custom Python scripts for vulnerability scoring.

Developed Python and SQL automation scripts to query Snowflake Data Platform and Azure Log Analytics for WAF telemetry, extracting insights on blocked threats, geographic attack origins, and API consumption trends, generating compliance dashboards aligned with NIST CSF continuous monitoring requirements.

Integrated Radware APIs with Azure API Management and Snowflake Data Platform to automate policy synchronization, export threat intelligence feeds, and orchestrate incident response workflows using Python connectors, enabling automated rule updates based on emerging healthcare threats across multi-cloud environments.

Implemented Azure Web Application Firewall and Azure DDoS Protection alongside Radware SaaS cWAAP to establish layered defense-in-depth for healthcare applications, configuring DDoS mitigation thresholds, traffic scrubbing policies, and failover mechanisms using Azure Monitor to ensure uptime for patient-facing services.

Enforced compliance with ISO 27001/27002, NIST CSF, and NIST 800-82 security frameworks by conducting quarterly assessments, validating WAF controls using Radware cWAAP, and documenting evidence for healthcare regulatory audits, mapping configurations to NIST CSF Protect and Detect functions.

Configured Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Azure Active Directory to enforce identity-based access controls, conditional access policies, and privileged identity management for administrators managing Radware SaaS cWAAP and healthcare infrastructure, integrating with Microsoft Sentinel for authentication anomaly correlation.

Managed concurrent priorities across application security, cloud infrastructure modernization, and compliance projects, coordinating cross-functional stakeholders including clinical IT and compliance officers through clear communication, delivering security briefings and remediation roadmaps using ServiceNow ticketing workflows during evolving threat landscapes.

Designed Azure Logic Apps to automate security orchestration workflows including automated ServiceNow ticket creation upon Radware cWAAP critical alert detection, threat indicator enrichment, and escalation protocols aligned with HIPAA breach notification timelines, integrating with Microsoft Sentinel playbooks for automated response actions.

Tuned Azure Monitor and Azure Log Analytics workspaces to centralize telemetry from Radware SaaS cWAAP, Azure Web Application Firewall, and Microsoft Sentinel, configuring custom KQL queries and alerting thresholds to detect anomalous API consumption, brute-force attempts, and unauthorized PHI access patterns.

Conducted SAST and DAST assessments across enterprise EHR platforms to detect code-based vulnerabilities in patient portal modules, collaborating with development teams to integrate secure coding practices into CI/CD pipelines, reducing exposure to SQL injection, XSS, and authentication bypass vulnerabilities while maintaining HL7 FHIR interoperability.

Implemented Azure API Management and Azure Load Balancer to optimize and secure communication between microservices supporting telehealth platforms, ensuring HIPAA-compliant data transmission and high availability, integrating Azure DDoS Protection to safeguard internet-facing endpoints from volumetric and application-layer attacks.

Deployed Microsoft Defender for Cloud to establish threat detection and security posture management across multi-cloud healthcare infrastructure, configuring automated remediation workflows and compliance scoring aligned with HIPAA Security Rule, NIST CSF, and HITRUST frameworks for proactive misconfiguration identification.

Configured Splunk Enterprise Security to aggregate and analyze security event logs from EMR systems, network devices, and identity platforms, developing custom correlation searches and dashboards supporting HIPAA audit controls, breach notification readiness, and incident response workflows aligned with security management processes.

Integrated QRadar SIEM to centralize security event monitoring across distributed healthcare environments including on-premises data centers and cloud-hosted EHR systems, building automated offense workflows and enrichment pipelines correlating threat intelligence feeds with internal logs using Python and SQL for timely escalation.
